content.rendered:
Coral Beach 105

  • Little Battaleys, Saint Peter
  • 2 guests
  • 1 bedroom
  • 1 bathroom

Introducing one of the newest built homes along the scenic West Coast of Barbados, Coral Beach 105. This one-bedroom vacation retreat is thoughtfully designed with a clean, modern aesthetic and is nestled in the peaceful enclave of Little Battaleys, St. Peter.

Enjoy full air-conditioning, a fully stocked kitchen, cable TV, high-speed WiFi, and a laptop-size safe. The apartment includes assigned parking and is conveniently located on the main bus route, just a short drive from Speightstown and Holetown.

This ground-floor unit features a bright, open-plan layout that flows seamlessly into an airy living space. Just steps away lies a refreshing communal swimming pool and lounging deck, ideal for relaxation. The private bedroom offers a queen-size bed, a spacious walk-in closet, and an en suite bathroom. Step onto your patio each morning to enjoy coffee amid lush gardens and tranquil surroundings.

Coral Beach 105 is part of a secure, gated community offering a communal BBQ area and a roof terrace perfect for sunset views. It’s located directly across from the famous Mullins Beach and is surrounded by essential amenities.

While staying here, you’ll be just minutes away from exploring Barbados’ rich culture and cuisine. Within walking distance, you’ll find local favourites like Grandene’s Bar & Bistro, Sea Shed, Larry Rogers, The Bearded Rose, and Reeds Beach.

Whether you’re seeking a romantic escape or a serene base for adventure, Coral Beach 105 delivers the perfect blend of comfort, location, and island charm.

Guest Access
Entire Unit · Communal Pool · Communal BBQ
Right across the road from the beach.

Our Guests, Their Words

Our guests' words capture the beauty and comfort of Barbados living.

view all reviews on airbnb
We had a fabulous stay at Coral Beach 105. In fact it was our second...
We had a fabulous stay at Coral Beach 105. In fact it was our second time! The apartment is perfect for us, spacious, cool and well appointed with everything we needed for a comfortable stay. The pool was a highlight for the children, and the beach is only a few minutes away. We enjoyed evenings at Bombas bar, a few minutes walk away, and also in Speightstown, a short drive away. We will definitely be back!

Juliet Johnson

May 2025

This apartment is just beautiful, relaxing and well equipped with all the essentials and a...
This apartment is just beautiful, relaxing and well equipped with all the essentials and a lovely welcome pack! We loved our stay; comfortable beds with en suite bathrooms and everything we needed to cook/eat in when we chose not to eat out. The beach is as it says - just across the road with another a 5 minute walk away. I loved having access to the swimming pool too - to get a quick dip before heading out. Thank you for making our holiday such an enjoyable experience!

Tracey Fletcher

4 months ago

Coral Beach 105 is a fabulous apartment set in a wonderful location in stunning Barbados....
Coral Beach 105 is a fabulous apartment set in a wonderful location in stunning Barbados. It provided everything we needed to enjoy our seven days stay, and our children insist they want to come back every year! Two comfortable bedrooms, brand new bathrooms and an open plan living and dining area offering both convenience and luxury, all spotlessly clean. The apartment is fully equipped so we didn’t want for anything and couldn’t have asked for more. The aircon and ceiling fans kept us super cool, and we spent hours sitting out on the shaded terrace reading and relaxing. Over the road just three minutes’ walk away is the most amazing beach with sunsets to die for which we enjoyed daily. The apartment complex also has a private pool with BBQ and seating area which is a brilliant and enjoyable addition. It wasn’t busy so most of the time it felt like ours. Local bars and restaurants are walkable, and we were treated to two excellent nights out at restaurants just five minutes’ drive away in Speightstown. Inspired Real Estate is a pleasure to deal with, proactive and always there to instantly help if required. Nothing was too much trouble for them. They certainly helped us to have a smooth and thoroughly enjoyable vacation. We highly recommend and we will definitely return.

Aj Johnson

6 months ago

I had such an amazing stay at 105 Coral Beach.Upon entry to this beautifully spacious...

I had such an amazing stay at 105 Coral Beach.
Upon entry to this beautifully spacious and clean apartment, I was greeted with a welcome tray equipped with fresh fruit, island guides and a bottle of Barbados's famous rum punch.
This apartment does not disappoint.
From its fully equipped kitchen with top of the range appliances, to the huge TV with cable connectivity. I was especially pleased that the built-in safe was large enough to fit my laptop and other valuables.
Perfectly located, it has stunning, quiet beaches just a short walk away. Getting around the island couldn't be easier too, with bus stops to either Bridgetown or Speightstown situated immediately outside the complex. Although quicker by bus, Speightstown is only a 10-15 minute walk away. There you'll have access to a supermarket, pharmacy, bank and a gym as well as great beach side restaurants and bars.
105 Coral Beach is just the perfect place to stay.
For me, it's my home-away-from-home and I can't wait to go back!

Margaret

October 2024 · Stayed a few nights

Great communication, warm welcome, very friendly host even dropped off christmas presents for us, free...
Great communication, warm welcome, very friendly host even dropped off christmas presents for us, free transfer from airport and also arranged a car for us to be dropped off to the apartment at a great rate. Very much recommended
